message:
disable: remove Apple Container support due to incompatibilities

- Remove 'container' from runtime detection
- Update error messages to mention docker/podman only
- Document limitation in README with link to GitHub issue
- Focus on Docker/Podman which work excellently
- See https://github.com/obra/packnplay/issues/1 for details

files.patch:
@@ -42,7 +42,9 @@
       "Bash(git remote set-url:*)",
       "Bash(make help:*)",
       "Bash(make test:*)",
-      "Bash(make build:*)"
+      "Bash(make build:*)",
+      "WebFetch(domain:github.com)",
+      "WebFetch(domain:raw.githubusercontent.com)"
     ],
     "deny": [],
     "ask": []

@@ -201,9 +201,12 @@ Created interactively on first run. Edit manually or delete to reconfigure.
 ### Environment Variables
 
 - `DOCKER_CMD`: Override docker command (e.g., `DOCKER_CMD=podman packnplay run ...`)
+
 - `XDG_DATA_HOME`: Override data directory (default: `~/.local/share`)
 - `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`: Override config directory (default: `~/.config`)
 
+**Note:** Apple Container support was disabled due to incompatibilities. See [issue #1](https://github.com/obra/packnplay/issues/1) for details. Use Docker Desktop or Podman on macOS.
+
 ## Examples
 
 ```bash
